nameMeanings.name: Adda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: West African (Ghana): Akan name, a variant of   Addae  .

variants.name: Addae
meanings: West African (Ghana): from an Akan personal name denoting a child born on adae ‘festival day, calendar point recurring every 43 days’. Compare Addai .
